tagline: Your Vision, Our Expertise — Custom Outdoor Living Spaces

hero.headline: Your Dream Outdoor Space Built to Last
hero.subheadline: For 25+ years, Atlanta Porch & Patio has designed and built premium outdoor living spaces across Metro Atlanta. From screened porches and custom decks to outdoor kitchens and fireplaces, our family-owned team handles every detail so you can enjoy the backyard you have always wanted.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Custom Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Built Around Your Life
services.subtitle: From morning coffee on a screened porch to evening gatherings around a custom fireplace, we design and build outdoor spaces that become the heart of your home.

cards.title: Screened Porches
cards.description: Custom-designed screened porches that extend your living space outdoors while keeping bugs and weather at bay, featuring premium materials and expert craftsmanship.

cards.title: Custom Decks
cards.description: Premium deck building using high-quality composite and Brazilian hardwood materials, designed and built to complement your home and elevate your outdoor experience.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Fully custom outdoor kitchen design and installation featuring built-in grills, countertops, cabinetry, and all the amenities for outdoor cooking and entertaining.

cards.title: Sunrooms & Enclosures
cards.description: Light-filled sunrooms and patio enclosures that seamlessly blend indoor comfort with outdoor views, perfect for three-season or year-round enjoyment.

cards.title: Outdoor Fireplaces
cards.description: Custom stone and masonry outdoor fireplaces that create a stunning focal point and extend the usability of your outdoor living space into cooler months.

cards.title: Complete Backyard Renovations
cards.description: Full-scale outdoor living transformations combining porches, patios, kitchens, and fireplaces into cohesive backyard retreats tailored to your vision.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Outdoor Space

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. We visit your home, take measurements, and discuss design ideas. You receive a detailed proposal with transparent pricing — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Your dedicated project manager guides every decision from materials to finishes. Our licensed team handles permits, construction, and inspections — exceeding Georgia building codes at every step.

steps.title: Enjoy Your New Outdoor Living Space
steps.description: Step into a backyard transformed. From the first morning coffee on your new porch to holiday gatherings around your fireplace, your outdoor space becomes your favorite room in the house.

about.label: Why Atlanta Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Design-Build Experts Since 2001
about.description: Founded by Solomon and Susan Elisha, Atlanta Porch & Patio has spent over 25 years turning backyards into beautiful outdoor living spaces across Metro Atlanta. We focus exclusively on custom builds and full-scale renovations — not repairs — because your outdoor space deserves the same care and craftsmanship as the finest room in your home. With 15 consecutive Best of Houzz awards, a BBB A+ rating, and a team that treats every project like their own home, we deliver results that stand the test of time.

features.title: Georgia Licensed & Insured
features.description: Our licensed team exceeds Georgia building code standards on every project, and we handle all permits and inspections so you never have to.

features.title: Dedicated Project Manager
features.description: From your first design meeting to the final walkthrough, a dedicated project manager guides every decision and keeps you informed at every step.

features.title: Premium Materials & Craftsmanship
features.description: We use only the finest materials — Brazilian hardwood, custom stone masonry, and top-tier composites — built to last for decades, not just seasons.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-designed to your vision. Request a free consultation for a detailed, no-obligation proposal tailored to your home.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project we build. If any aspect of our work does not meet the standards we promised, we will make it right at no additional cost. With 25+ years of builds across Metro Atlanta, our reputation is built on delivering outdoor spaces that exceed expectations — and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary by scope and complexity. A screened porch may take 4-6 weeks, while a full backyard renovation can take 3-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during your consultation and keep you informed at every milestone.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Metro Atlanta area including Marietta, Roswell, Alpharetta, Sandy Springs, Woodstock, Milton, Canton, Buckhead, Decatur, Kennesaw, and 30+ surrounding communities throughout Cobb, Fulton, Cherokee, and DeKalb counties.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team manages all permits, HOA approvals, and code inspections from start to finish. We are fully licensed in Georgia and our work exceeds local building code standards.

faqs.question: What is the typical investment range?
faqs.answer: Our custom projects typically range from $25,000 to $500,000 depending on scope and materials. We provide detailed, transparent proposals after your free on-site consultation so there are never any surprises.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to offer flexible payment options for qualified homeowners. We discuss all available options during your consultation so you can choose what works best for your budget.

testimonials.name: Hillary D.
testimonials.text: We just finished our screened in porch and could not be happier! Judy was fantastic — very communicative and clear throughout the permitting process. The craftsmanship is outstanding.

testimonials.name: Drew M.
testimonials.text: We have been customers for over 10 years. The team's professionalism, responsiveness, and quality craftsmanship earn our strongest recommendation. They truly stand behind their work.

testimonials.name: Andrew E.
testimonials.text: Top-notch craftsmanship on our custom 3-season screened porch. Project Manager Judy Goldberg's professionalism and communication were outstanding from start to finish.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation design consultation. We will visit your home, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing.
